comments: Workaround for the 'Operate In Server Core' test on Windows Server 2016.
The test should be filtered out (20801 v4 / 200656 v3), but filtering does not work on Server 2016.
To work around this, temporarily set the 'InstallationType' registry value to 'Server Core'.

pre_test_commands.desc: Set 'Server Core' into Registry to work around Server Core test issues

post_test_commands.desc: Revert 'Server Core' to 'Server' registry value after test completion
